purpose: Enumerate candidate concepts for Baseline Questions v2

gaps.concept: Access control system exists and is operational
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: System existence was considered too specific for minimal baseline scope
gaps.baseline_applicability: Physical access control is a universal physical security capability applicable to all facility types

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for access control system operation
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Basic operational procedures for access control systems are universally applicable across facility types

gaps.concept: Personnel with responsibility for access control system management
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Role delineation beyond 'exists' was simplified to avoid management nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Access control systems require designated management responsibility, universally applicable

gaps.concept: Video surveillance system exists and is operational
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: System existence was considered too specific for minimal baseline scope
gaps.baseline_applicability: Video surveillance is a universal physical security capability applicable to all facility types

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for video surveillance system operation and monitoring
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Basic operational procedures for video surveillance are universally applicable across facility types

gaps.concept: Video surveillance system maintenance activities are performed
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Maintenance requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: System maintenance is a universal requirement for operational video surveillance systems

gaps.concept: Intrusion detection system exists and is operational
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: System existence was considered too specific for minimal baseline scope
gaps.baseline_applicability: Intrusion detection is a universal physical security capability applicable to all facility types

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for intrusion detection system operation and alarm response
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Basic alarm response procedures are universally applicable across facility types

gaps.concept: Perimeter barriers exist to define facility boundary
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Physical barrier requirements were excluded to avoid environment-specific nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Perimeter definition through barriers is a universal physical security concept

gaps.concept: Perimeter security measures are maintained
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Maintenance requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Perimeter security maintenance is universally applicable to all facilities with defined perimeters

gaps.concept: Security lighting exists for facility perimeter and critical areas
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Lighting requirements were excluded to avoid environment-specific nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security lighting is a universal physical security capability applicable to all facility types

gaps.concept: Security lighting systems are maintained
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Maintenance requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Lighting system maintenance is universally applicable to all facilities with security lighting

gaps.concept: Security personnel roles and responsibilities are defined
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Expanded role delineation beyond 'exists' was simplified to avoid management nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security personnel role definition is universally applicable where security personnel exist

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for security personnel operations
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Basic operational procedures for security personnel are universally applicable

gaps.concept: Security operations center or monitoring capability exists
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Operational capability requirements were excluded to avoid context-driven management requirements
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security monitoring capability is a universal physical security concept

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for security operations and response
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Basic security operations procedures are universally applicable across facility types

gaps.concept: Visitor management process or system exists
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Visitor management was excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Visitor management is a universal physical security capability applicable to facilities that receive visitors

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for visitor management
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Basic visitor management procedures are universally applicable

gaps.concept: Emergency response procedures exist
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Emergency procedures were excluded to avoid context-driven management requirements
gaps.baseline_applicability: Emergency response procedures are universally applicable to all facilities

gaps.concept: Personnel with responsibility for emergency response coordination
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Role delineation beyond 'exists' was simplified to avoid management nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Emergency response coordination responsibility is universally applicable

gaps.concept: Security system maintenance activities are performed
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Maintenance requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security system maintenance is a universal requirement for operational security systems

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for security system maintenance
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Maintenance procedures are universally applicable to all facilities with security systems

gaps.concept: Security system testing activities are performed
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Testing requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security system testing is a universal requirement for verifying system functionality

gaps.concept: Security documentation exists for system operations
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Documentation requirements beyond policy were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security system documentation is universally applicable to all facilities with security systems

gaps.concept: Security systems are integrated or coordinated
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Integration requirements were excluded to avoid context-driven management requirements
gaps.baseline_applicability: System integration is a universal physical security capability where multiple systems exist

gaps.concept: Interior physical barriers exist for asset protection
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Interior barrier requirements were excluded to avoid environment-specific nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Interior physical barriers are a universal physical security capability

gaps.concept: Security communications system exists
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Communication system requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security communications are a universal physical security capability

gaps.concept: Documented procedures for security program management
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Procedural requirements beyond policy were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security program management procedures are universally applicable

gaps.concept: Security management personnel responsibilities are documented
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Expanded role documentation was simplified to avoid management nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Security management responsibility documentation is universally applicable

gaps.concept: Access control system maintenance activities are performed
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Maintenance requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Access control system maintenance is universally applicable to all facilities with access control systems

gaps.concept: Personnel with responsibility for video surveillance system management
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Role delineation beyond 'exists' was simplified to avoid management nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Video surveillance management responsibility is universally applicable

gaps.concept: Intrusion detection system maintenance activities are performed
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Maintenance requirements were excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
gaps.baseline_applicability: Intrusion detection system maintenance is universally applicable to all facilities with intrusion detection systems

gaps.concept: Personnel with responsibility for intrusion detection system management
gaps.reason_excluded_from_v1: Role delineation beyond 'exists' was simplified to avoid management nuance
gaps.baseline_applicability: Intrusion detection management responsibility is universally applicable

top_exclusion_reasons: Procedural requirements excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
System existence too specific for minimal baseline
Role delineation simplified to avoid management nuance
Maintenance requirements excluded to avoid operational constraint creep
